---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: "images/profile-pic-cartoon.png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10rem
format:
  html: 
    linestretch: 1.7
    page-layout: article
filters: 
  - nutshell
---

```{=html}
<script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ncase/nutshell/nutshell.js'></script>
```

:::{#hero-heading}
**Abdelkarim el Ghani** is a Research Assistant at the [**Erasmus University Rotterdam**](https://www.eur.nl/){target="_blank"}. His expertise lies in:

[:Statistical data analysis](# "Turning raw data into meaningful insights through advanced statistical methods.")  
[:Neuroscience](# "Exploring the brain's complexity and the factors that shape human behavior.")  
[:Open science practices](# "Promoting transparency, accessibility, and collaboration in research.")

Driven by a passion for data-driven problem-solving, Abdelkarim's work involves:

[:Programming](# "Utilizing tools like R, Python, and Quarto for reproducible workflows.")  
[:Data visualization](# "Transforming numbers into compelling visual stories.")  
[:Reproducible research](# "Ensuring findings can be verified and built upon by others.")

Click on any term to learn more about what it means in my day-to-day work!
:::


<a href="https://www.pexels.com/photo/white-painted-wall-1939485/" target="_blank" class="small-link">Photo by Henry & Co.</a>
